coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether a Director-level promotion setback has turned into disengagement or can be converted into a credible path forward.
openingQuestion: What did you take away from the promotion decision, and how is that shaping where you’re putting your energy right now?
listenFor: whether he quotes specific feedback themes or stays vague about what was said
if they mention a recent ritual, meeting, or forum where they pulled back or showed up differently
if they describe the mentoring program with concrete Director-scope outcomes or pivot away from his core product leadership work
avoid: do not open by defending the promotion decision before you know what he heard
do not treat lower ritual participation as the problem if it may be a signal of a broader Director-level path concern
goodOutcome: You and James have agreed one concrete Director-level scope or leadership bet for this quarter that connects the promotion feedback to how he will show readiness next.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick the two most decision-relevant feedback themes from the promotion discussion and one recent example of his changed participation so you can test specifics without sounding speculative.
